---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](profile.jpg){fig-align="center" .profile-img}

<div class="profile-icons" role="navigation" aria-label="Profile links">
  <a href="https://github.com/lcnnri" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lcnnri/" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dj4zuJYAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=sra" aria-label="Google Scholar"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i></a>
  <a href="mailto:luca.neri@uclouvain.be" aria-label="Email"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
  <a href="cv.pdf" title="Download CV" aria-label="Download CV"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i></a>
</div>

<div class="research-cta">
<a href="research.qmd" class="pub-pill">Research Papers</a>
</div>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}

## Welcome to my website!

I am a **Marie Skłodowska-Curie Postdoctoral Fellow** at [CORE](https://uclouvain.be/en/research-institutes/lidam/core), [UCLouvain](https://uclouvain.be/en/index.html), working on the project *MacHete: Macroeconomic Aggregates and Heterogeneity*.

You can read a short introduction to the project [here](https://www.uclouvain.be/en/news/machete).


Previously, I was at [University of Bologna](https://www.unibo.it/en). I obtained my Ph.D. degree from [Aarhus University](https://www.au.dk/).

My main research interests are **Econometrics**, **Macroeconomics**, and **Macro-Finance**.

:::

:::

::: {.contact-section}
**e-mail:** luca.neri(at)uclouvain.be

CORE  
Voie du Roman Pays 34, L1.03.01  
1348 Louvain-la-Neuve  
Belgium  
:::
